seo.title: Scanbot SDK — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec

when_to_use: On-device ID document scanning for KYC mobile apps
Barcode scanning SDK for warehouse and inventory tracking
Offline document capture for low-connectivity field apps
React Native and Flutter cross-platform scan integration

pros: On-device scanning keeps sensitive data off servers
Strong accuracy on barcodes, IDs, and documents
Covers iOS, Android, web, Flutter, and React Native
cons: License fees are steep for small apps
SDK size adds meaningful bundle weight
Advanced features gated behind higher tiers
Niche fit versus cheaper open-source barcode libs
review.verdict: Premium cross-platform scanning SDK that earns its price for privacy-sensitive or regulated apps.
review.best_for: Teams building ID, logistics, or health apps needing accurate on-device document scanning.
review.not_for: Hobby apps, simple barcode use cases, or teams happy with free OS-level scanners.

lock_in.reason: SDK integration moderate, data stays on-device
